title: Introduction to Cloud Computing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the basics of cloud computing.

questions.question: What is the primary role of Cloud Computing in modern software development?
options: On-demand delivery of computing services—including servers and storage—over the internet

questions.question: Regarding DevOps, what is a key benefit of using a cloud-based server instead of a traditional local server machine?
options: It provides easier access to powerful and scalable resources as your project grows
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
